title: Queue Reconstruction By Height
hints: Consider processing people in a specific order so that inserting one person never invalidates the 'k' counts of people already placed.
Sort by height descending, then by 'k' ascending. This way, taller people are fixed first, and shorter people don't affect their counts.
Insert each person into the result list at index 'k'. Since they are shorter or equal, they won't shift the positions of taller people already in the list.
